center.name: 彼得马里茨堡
center.summary: 彼得马里茨堡是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括African rail，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African rail (Rallus caerulescens), sometimes also Kaffir rail, is a small wetland bird of the rail family that is found in eastern and southern Africa

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The African rail (Rallus caerulescens), sometimes also Kaffir rail, is a small wetland bird of the rail family that is found in eastern and southern Africa
